binding entrant data to the row and setting up the cancel button with a confirmation dialog

binding event data to the view holder and configuring sign up, cancel, delete and invite buttons based on user role

onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.AccessibilityActivity
setting up the accessibility settings screen with toggle controls for color blind mode and reduce motion preferences
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.AddEvent
initializing the event creation form with input fields, date pickers, image selector, and publish button
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.AdminBrowseImagesActivity
setting up the admin image browser with a grid RecyclerView showing all event poster images from Firestore
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.AdminPage
setting up the admin dashboard with navigation buttons for events, profiles, organizers, images, and sign out
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.AllEventsActivity
setting up the events listing screen with category chip filters, search bar and a RecyclerView that loads events based on the viewing mode (all, organizer, admin)
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.AllProfiles
setting up the profiles listing screen and loading either all entrant profiles or organizer profiles based on the intent type parameter
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.CalendarActivity
initializing the calendar view, setting today's date and loading events from firestore
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.EditPosterActivity
setting up the poster editing screen with gallery picker and upload confirmation button
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.EntrantMapActivity
setting up the map screen by getting the event id from the intent and initializing the Google Map fragment asynchronously
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.EventCreatedActivity
setting up the success screen after event creation by displaying the event title and generating a QR code from the event's unique id
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.EventDetailActivity
setting up the event detail screen, loading event data from firestore, and configuring sign up buttons based on attendee status
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.EventHistoryActivity
setting up the event history screen with a RecyclerView showing all events the user participated in
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.HomePage
initializing the home page layout with event carousel, quick access cards, qr scanner, and bottom nav
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.InviteActivity
setting up the invite screen with a searchable list of all user profiles that can be invited to the current event
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.LotteryInfoActivity
setting up the lottery info screen by loading event details, waitlist count and the current user's lottery status from Firestore
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.MainActivity
setting up the login form with email and password fields and wiring login and register button listeners
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.NotificationLogActivity
setting up the admin notification log screen showing all notifications stored in Firestore ordered by most recent first
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.NotificationsActivity
setting up the notifications screen with a RecyclerView that displays all notifications belonging to the currently signed in user
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.ProfilePage
setting up the profile page by loading user data from Firestore, configuring role based button visibility and wiring up edit, signout and delete account actions
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.RegisterPage
setting up the registration form with role selection, input fields, and firebase account creation
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.viewAttendee
initializing the attendee list view and configuring buttons based on the list type
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.vigilante.WaitingListActivity
setting up the waiting list screen with a RecyclerView showing all entrants on the event's waiting list loaded from Firestore, falling back to placeholder data if the query fails or returns empty

intercepting all touch events so the nav bar handles taps and drags directly

receiving the ready GoogleMap instance, querying Firestore for entrant locations in the event's attendees subcollection and placing a marker for each entrant that has latitude and longitude data

pausing the auto scroll when the activity goes to the background

handling the location permission result and continuing with sign up after the user responds

recalculating tab width and pill position when the view size changes
